title: World News Today Live Updates on June 27, 2026 : Israel, Lebanon reach framework deal; US mediator says agreement is 'first step' toward peace, releases text
content:
• Israel and Lebanon reached a framework deal on June 27, 2026, with a US mediator describing it as a 'first step' toward peace.
